Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(* ******************************************************************************* *)
(** The inclusion of pseudofunctors into strict pseudofunctors for locally univalent
bicategories
 ********************************************************************************* *)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.StrictPseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.Base.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.Map1Cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.Map2Cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.StrictIdentitor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.StrictCompositor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.StrictPseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.

Notation "##" was already used.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Modification.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.StrictToPseudo.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Identity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Composition.

Local Open Scope cat.

Opaque psfunctor pstrans.
Opaque strict_psfunctor.

Section Strictify.
  Variable (B₁ B₂ : bicat)
           (HB₂_2_1 : is_univalent_2_1 B₂).

  Local Arguments idtoiso_2_1 {_} {_} {_} {_} {_} _.
  Local Arguments isotoid_2_1 {_} _ {_} {_} {_} {_} _.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
psfunctor B₁ B₂ → strict_psfunctor_data B₁ B₂

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
psfunctor B₁ B₂ → strict_psfunctor_data B₁ B₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
strict_psfunctor_data B₁ B₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
B₁ → B₂
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ a b : B₁, B₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → B₂ ⟦ ?F₀ a, ?F₀ b ⟧
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (a b : B₁) (f g : B₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f ==> g → ?F₁ a b f ==> ?F₁ a b g
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ a : B₁, id₁ (?F₀ a) = ?F₁ a a (id₁ a)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (a b c : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
(g : B₁ ⟦ b, c ⟧),
?F₁ a b f · ?F₁ b c g = ?F₁ a c (f · g)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
B₁ → B₂
 exact (λ X, F X).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ a b : B₁,
B₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ B₂ ⟦ (λ X : B₁, F X) a, (λ X : B₁, F X) b ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ f, #F f).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (a b : B₁) (f g : B₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f ==> g
→ (λ (a0 b0 : B₁) (f0 : B₁ ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧), # F f0) a b f ==>
  (λ (a0 b0 : B₁) (f0 : B₁ ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧), # F f0) a b g
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
a, b: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
# F f ==> # F g

      exact (psfunctor_on_cells F α).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ a : B₁,
id₁ ((λ X : B₁, F X) a) =
(λ (a0 b : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ a0, b ⟧), # F f) a a (id₁ a)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
a: B₁
id₁ (F a) = # F (id₁ a)

      exact (isotoid_2_1 HB₂_2_1 (psfunctor_id F a)).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (a b c : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B₁ ⟦ b, c ⟧),
(λ (a0 b0 : B₁) (f0 : B₁ ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧), # F f0) a b f
· (λ (a0 b0 : B₁) (f0 : B₁ ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧), # F f0) b c g =
(λ (a0 b0 : B₁) (f0 : B₁ ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧), # F f0) a c
  (f · g)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
a, b, c: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ b, c ⟧
# F f · # F g = # F (f · g)

      exact (isotoid_2_1 HB₂_2_1 (psfunctor_comp F f g)).
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
is_strict_psfunctor (strictify_ob_data F)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
is_strict_psfunctor (strictify_ob_data F)

    repeat split ; try (apply F)
    ; intro ; intros ; cbn ;
      unfold StrictPseudoFunctorBicat.strict_psfunctor_id_cell,
      StrictPseudoFunctorBicat.strict_psfunctor_comp_cell ;
      cbn ;
      rewrite !idtoiso_2_1_isotoid_2_1 ;
      apply F.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
psfunctor B₁ B₂ → strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
psfunctor B₁ B₂ → strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
strict_psfunctor_data B₁ B₂
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
is_strict_psfunctor ?F

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
strict_psfunctor_data B₁ B₂
 exact (strictify_ob_data F).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
is_strict_psfunctor (strictify_ob_data F)
 exact (strictify_ob_is_strict_psfunctor F).
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
strict_pstrans_data (strictify_ob F) (strictify_ob G)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
strict_pstrans_data (strictify_ob F) (strictify_ob G)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
∏ x : B₁, B₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
∏ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (?Goal X · # G f) (# F f · ?Goal Y)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
∏ x : B₁, B₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
 exact (λ X, η X).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
∏ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell ((λ X0 : B₁, η X0) X · # G f)
  (# F f · (λ X0 : B₁, η X0) Y)
 exact (λ X Y f, psnaturality_of η f).
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
is_strict_pstrans (strictify_mor_data F G η)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
is_strict_pstrans (strictify_mor_data F G η)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
∏ (X Y : B₁) (f g : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X
 ◃ ## (strictify_ob G) α)
• pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X Y g =
pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X Y f
• (## (strictify_ob F) α
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) Y)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
∏ X : B₁,
(pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X
 ◃ strict_psfunctor_id_cell (strictify_ob G) X)
• pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X))
• (strict_psfunctor_id_cell (strictify_ob F) X
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
∏ (X Y Z : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) 
(g : B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X
 ◃ strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob G) f g)
• pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X)
      (# (strictify_ob G) f) 
      (# (strictify_ob G) g)
    • (pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X Y f
       ▹ # (strictify_ob G) g))
   • rassociator (# (strictify_ob F) f)
       (pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) Y)
       (# (strictify_ob G) g))
  • (# (strictify_ob F) f
     ◃ pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# (strictify_ob F) f)
     (# (strictify_ob F) g)
     (pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) Z))
• (strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob F) f g
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) Z)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
∏ (X Y : B₁) (f g : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X
 ◃ ## (strictify_ob G) α)
• pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X Y g =
pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X Y f
• (## (strictify_ob F) α
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) Y)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
(η X ◃ psfunctor_on_cells G α) • psnaturality_of η g =
psnaturality_of η f • (psfunctor_on_cells F α ▹ η Y)

      apply (psnaturality_natural η).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
∏ X : B₁,
(pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X
 ◃ strict_psfunctor_id_cell (strictify_ob G) X)
• pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X))
• (strict_psfunctor_id_cell (strictify_ob F) X
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
X: B₁
(η X
 ◃ idtoiso_2_1
     (isotoid_2_1 HB₂_2_1 (psfunctor_id G X)))
• psnaturality_of η (id₁ X) =
(runitor (η X) • linvunitor (η X))
• (idtoiso_2_1
     (isotoid_2_1 HB₂_2_1 (psfunctor_id F X)) ▹ η X)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
X: B₁
(η X ◃ psfunctor_id G X) • psnaturality_of η (id₁ X) =
(runitor (η X) • linvunitor (η X))
• (psfunctor_id F X ▹ η X)

      apply (pstrans_id η).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
∏ (X Y Z : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (g : B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X
 ◃ strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob G) f g)
• pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X)
      (# (strictify_ob G) f) (# (strictify_ob G) g)
    • (pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) X Y f
       ▹ # (strictify_ob G) g))
   • rassociator (# (strictify_ob F) f)
       (pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) Y)
       (# (strictify_ob G) g))
  • (# (strictify_ob F) f
     ◃ pr2 (strictify_mor_data F G η) Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# (strictify_ob F) f)
     (# (strictify_ob F) g)
     (pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) Z))
• (strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob F) f g
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_mor_data F G η) Z)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(η X
 ◃ idtoiso_2_1
     (isotoid_2_1 HB₂_2_1 (psfunctor_comp G f g)))
• psnaturality_of η (f · g) =
((((lassociator (η X) (# G f) (# G g)
    • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ # G g))
   • rassociator (# F f) (η Y) (# G g))
  • (# F f ◃ psnaturality_of η g))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (η Z))
• (idtoiso_2_1
     (isotoid_2_1 HB₂_2_1 (psfunctor_comp F f g))
   ▹ η Z)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(η X ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)
• psnaturality_of η (f · g) =
((((lassociator (η X) (# G f) (# G g)
    • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ # G g))
   • rassociator (# F f) (η Y) (# G g))
  • (# F f ◃ psnaturality_of η g))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (η Z))
• (psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ η Z)

      apply (pstrans_comp η).
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
pstrans F G
→ strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ strictify_ob F,
  strictify_ob G ⟧

pstrans F G
→ strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ strictify_ob F,
  strictify_ob G ⟧

is_strict_pstrans ?η

F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
strict_pstrans_data (strictify_ob F) (strictify_ob G)
 exact (strictify_mor_data F G η).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η: pstrans F G
is_strict_pstrans (strictify_mor_data F G η)
 exact (strictify_mor_is_strict_pstrans F G η).
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η₁, η₂: pstrans F G
modification η₁ η₂
→ strictify_mor F G η₁ ==> strictify_mor F G η₂

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η₁, η₂: pstrans F G
modification η₁ η₂
→ strictify_mor F G η₁ ==> strictify_mor F G η₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η₁, η₂: pstrans F G
m: modification η₁ η₂
strictify_mor F G η₁ ==> strictify_mor F G η₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η₁, η₂: pstrans F G
m: modification η₁ η₂
∏ X : B₁,
(pr111 (strictify_mor F G η₁)) X ==>
(pr111 (strictify_mor F G η₂)) X
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η₁, η₂: pstrans F G
m: modification η₁ η₂
is_strict_modification ?m

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η₁, η₂: pstrans F G
m: modification η₁ η₂
∏ X : B₁,
(pr111 (strictify_mor F G η₁)) X ==>
(pr111 (strictify_mor F G η₂)) X
 exact (λ X, m X).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
η₁, η₂: pstrans F G
m: modification η₁ η₂
is_strict_modification (λ X : B₁, m X)
 abstract (intros X Y f ;
                exact (modnaturality_of m _ _ f)).
  Defined.

  (λ X : B₁, id₂ ((pr111 (id₁ (strictify_ob F))) X))

η₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(pr211 (strictify_mor F₁ F₂ η₁
        · strictify_mor F₂ F₃ η₂)) X Y f
• (# (strictify_ob F₁) f
   ◃ id₂
       ((pr111 (strictify_mor F₁ F₂ η₁

(id₂
   ((pr111 (strictify_mor F₁ F₂ η₁
            · strictify_mor F₂ F₃ η₂)) X)
 ▹ # (strictify_ob F₃) f)
• (pr211 (strictify_mor F₁ F₂ η₁

→ strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ ?F₀ a, ?F₀ b ⟧

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (a b : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f g : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f ==> g → ?F₁ a b f ==> ?F₁ a b g
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ a : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
id₁ (?F₀ a) ==> ?F₁ a a (id₁ a)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (a b c : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧),
?F₁ a b f · ?F₁ b c g ==> ?F₁ a c (f · g)

psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ → strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
 exact strictify_ob.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ a b : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ strictify_ob a,
  strictify_ob b ⟧
 exact strictify_mor.

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (a b : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f g : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f ==> g → strictify_mor a b f ==> strictify_mor a b g
 exact strictify_cell.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ a : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
id₁ (strictify_ob a) ==> strictify_mor a a (id₁ a)
 exact strictify_identitor.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (a b c : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧),
strictify_mor a b f · strictify_mor b c g ==>
strictify_mor a c (f · g)
 exact strictify_compositor.
  Defined.

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
X: B₁
id₂ ((pr111 f) X) = id₂ (f X)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f, g, h: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
X: B₁
(pr111 η) X • (pr111 φ) X = η X • φ X
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
X: B₁
lunitor (f X) =
((id₂ (id₁ (a X)) ▹ f X)
 • id₂ (id₁ ((pr111 a) X) · f X))
• lunitor ((pr111 f) X)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
X: B₁
runitor (f X) =
((f X ◃ id₂ (id₁ (b X)))
 • id₂ (f X · id₁ ((pr111 b) X)))
• runitor ((pr111 f) X)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b, c, d: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ c, d ⟧
X: B₁
((f X ◃ id₂ (g X · h X))
 • id₂ (f X · ((pr111 g) X · (pr111 h) X)))
• lassociator ((pr111 f) X) 
    ((pr111 g) X) ((pr111 h) X) =
(lassociator (f X) (g X) (h X)
 • (id₂ (f X · g X) ▹ h X))
• id₂ ((pr111 f) X · (pr111 g) X · h X)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b, c: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
X: B₁
id₂ (f X · g₁ X) • ((pr111 f) X ◃ (pr111 η) X) =
(f X ◃ η X) • id₂ (f X · g₂ X)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b, c: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f₁, f₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
X: B₁
id₂ (f₁ X · g X) • ((pr111 η) X ▹ (pr111 g) X) =
(η X ▹ g X) • id₂ (f₂ X · g X)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
X: B₁
id₂ ((pr111 f) X) = id₂ (f X)
 exact (idpath _).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f, g, h: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
X: B₁
(pr111 η) X • (pr111 φ) X = η X • φ X
 exact (idpath _).

X: B₁
lunitor (f X) =
((id₂ (id₁ (a X)) ▹ f X)
 • id₂ (id₁ ((pr111 a) X) · f X))
• lunitor ((pr111 f) X)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat

a, b: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
X: B₁
lunitor (f X) = lunitor ((pr111 f) X)

      exact (idpath _).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
X: B₁
runitor (f X) =
((f X ◃ id₂ (id₁ (b X)))
 • id₂ (f X · id₁ ((pr111 b) X)))
• runitor ((pr111 f) X)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
X: B₁
runitor (f X) = runitor ((pr111 f) X)

      exact (idpath _).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b, c, d: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ c, d ⟧
X: B₁
((f X ◃ id₂ (g X · h X))
 • id₂ (f X · ((pr111 g) X · (pr111 h) X)))
• lassociator ((pr111 f) X) ((pr111 g) X)
    ((pr111 h) X) =
(lassociator (f X) (g X) (h X)
 • (id₂ (f X · g X) ▹ h X))
• id₂ ((pr111 f) X · (pr111 g) X · h X)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b, c, d: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ c, d ⟧
X: B₁
lassociator ((pr111 f) X) ((pr111 g) X) ((pr111 h) X) =
lassociator (f X) (g X) (h X)

      exact (idpath _).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b, c: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
X: B₁
id₂ (f X · g₁ X) • ((pr111 f) X ◃ (pr111 η) X) =
(f X ◃ η X) • id₂ (f X · g₂ X)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b, c: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
X: B₁
(pr111 f) X ◃ (pr111 η) X = f X ◃ η X

      exact (idpath _).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b, c: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f₁, f₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
X: B₁
id₂ (f₁ X · g X) • ((pr111 η) X ▹ (pr111 g) X) =
(η X ▹ g X) • id₂ (f₂ X · g X)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
a, b, c: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
f₁, f₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
X: B₁
(pr111 η) X ▹ (pr111 g) X = η X ▹ g X

      exact (idpath _).
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
invertible_cells strictify_data

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
invertible_cells strictify_data

    split ; intros ; apply make_is_invertible_strict_modification
    ; intros ; cbn ; is_iso.
  Qed.

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (?η₁ X · # F f)
  (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
        (strictify_ob F)) f · 
   ?η₁ Y)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ X : B₁,
B₂
⟦ strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
    (strictify_ob F) X, F X ⟧
 exact (λ X, id₁ (F X)).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell ((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ (F X0)) X · # F f)
  (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
        (strictify_ob F)) f
   · (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ (F X0)) Y)

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (X Y : B₁) (f g : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X
 ◃ psfunctor_on_cells F α)
• pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X Y g =
pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X Y f
• (psfunctor_on_cells
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
        (strictify_ob F)) α
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) Y)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ X : B₁,
(pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X
 ◃ psfunctor_id F X)
• pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X))
• (psfunctor_id
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
        (strictify_ob F)) X
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (X Y Z : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) 
(g : B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F f g)
• pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X)
      (# F f) (# F g)
    • (pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X Y f
       ▹ # F g))
   • rassociator
       (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
             (strictify_ob F)) f)
       (pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) Y) 
       (# F g))
  • (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
          (strictify_ob F)) f
     ◃ pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) Y Z g))
 • lassociator
     (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
           (strictify_ob F)) f)
     (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
           (strictify_ob F)) g)
     (pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) Z))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
        (strictify_ob F)) f g
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) Z)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (X Y : B₁) (f g : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X
 ◃ psfunctor_on_cells F α)
• pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X Y g =
pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X Y f
• (psfunctor_on_cells
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
        (strictify_ob F)) α
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) Y)

     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
        (strictify_ob F)) α ▹ id₁ (F Y))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (X Y Z : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (g : B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F f g)
• pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X)
      (# F f) (# F g)
    • (pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) X Y f
       ▹ # F g))
   • rassociator
       (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
             (strictify_ob F)) f)
       (pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) Y) (# F g))
  • (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
          (strictify_ob F)) f
     ◃ pr2 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) Y Z g))
 • lassociator
     (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
           (strictify_ob F)) f)
     (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
           (strictify_ob F)) g)
     (pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) Z))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
        (strictify_ob F)) f g
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_counit_comp_comp F) Z)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(id₁ (F X) ◃ (pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
• (lunitor (# F (f · g)) • rinvunitor (# F (f · g))) =
((((lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (# F g)
    • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ # F g))
   • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ (F Z)))
• (strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob F) f g
   ▹ id₁ (F Z))

?b

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

▹ id₁ (F Z) = (pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z)

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
idtoiso_2_1
  (isotoid_2_1 HB₂_2_1 (psfunctor_comp F f g))
▹ id₁ (F Z) = (pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ id₁ (F Z) =
(pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z)

      apply idpath.

pstrans

     (strictify_ob F)) F

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

is_pstrans ?η

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
pstrans_data
  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
     (strictify_ob F)) F
 exact (strictify_counit_comp_comp F).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
is_pstrans (strictify_counit_comp_comp F)
 exact (strictify_counit_comp_is_pstrans F).
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
    • (id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y))
• (# F f ◃ (lunitor (α Y) • rinvunitor (α Y))) =
((((((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor (α X))
     ▹ # G f) • rassociator (α X) (id₁ (G X)) (# G f))
   • (α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f))))
  • lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y)))
 • (psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y)))
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y))

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
    • (id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y))
• (# F f ◃ (lunitor (α Y) • rinvunitor (α Y))) =
((((((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor (α X))
     ▹ # G f) • rassociator (α X) (id₁ (G X)) (# G f))
   • (α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f))))
  • lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y)))
 • (psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y)))
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor (α X))
     ▹ # G f) • rassociator (α X) (id₁ (G X)) (# G f))
   • (α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f))))
  • lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y)))
 • (psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y)))
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) =
((((rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
    • (id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y))
• (# F f ◃ (lunitor (α Y) • rinvunitor (α Y)))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor (α X))
     ▹ # G f) • rassociator (α X) (id₁ (G X)) (# G f))
   • (α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f))))
  • lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y)))
 • (psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y)))
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
?b =
((((rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
    • (id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y))
• (# F f ◃ (lunitor (α Y) • rinvunitor (α Y)))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor (α X))
     ▹ # G f) • rassociator (α X) (id₁ (G X)) (# G f))
   • (α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f))))
  • lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y)))
 • (psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y)))
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) = ?b

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor (α X)) ▹ # G f)
• rassociator (α X) (id₁ (G X)) (# G f) = ?y'

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f)
 • (rinvunitor (α X) ▹ # G f))
• rassociator (α X) (id₁ (G X)) (# G f) = ?y'

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f)
• ((rinvunitor (α X) ▹ # G f)
   • rassociator (α X) (id₁ (G X)) (# G f)) = ?y'

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
id₂ (# G f) ⋆⋆ lunitor ((pr111 α) X)
• (id₂ (# G f) ⋆⋆ rinvunitor (α X)
   • rassociator (α X) (id₁ (G X)) (# G f)) = ?y'

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
id₂ (# G f) ⋆⋆ lunitor ((pr111 α) X)
• linvunitor (# G f) ⋆⋆ id₂ (α X) = ?y'

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f)
• (α X ◃ linvunitor (# G f)) = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(((((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f)
    • (α X ◃ linvunitor (# G f)))
   • (α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f))))
  • lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y)))
 • (psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y)))
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) =
((((rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
    • (id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y))
• (# F f ◃ (lunitor (α Y) • rinvunitor (α Y)))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f)
• ((α X ◃ linvunitor (# G f))
   • ((α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f)))
      • (lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y))
         • ((psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y))
            • rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)))))) =
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
• ((id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y)
      • (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y)
         • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y)
            • (# F f
               ◃ (lunitor (α Y) • rinvunitor (α Y)))))))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f)
• ((α X ◃ linvunitor (# G f))
   • ((α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f)))
      • (lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y))
         • ((psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y))
            • rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
?b =
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
• ((id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y)
      • (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y)
         • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y)
            • (# F f
               ◃ (lunitor (α Y) • rinvunitor (α Y)))))))

F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f)
• ((α X ◃ linvunitor (# G f))
   • ((α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f)))
      • (lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y))
         • ((psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y))
            • rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)))))) =
?b

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(α X ◃ linvunitor (# G f))
• ((α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f)))
   • (lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y))
      • ((psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y))
         • rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y))))) =
?t2

F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((α X ◃ linvunitor (# G f))
   • (α X ◃ (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f))))
  • lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y)))
 • (psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y)))
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) = ?t2

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(((α X
   ◃ (linvunitor (# G f)
      • (lunitor (# G f) • rinvunitor (# G f))))
  • lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y)))
 • (psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y)))
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) = ?t2

(((α X
   ◃ ((linvunitor (# G f) • lunitor (# G f))
      • rinvunitor (# G f)))
  • lassociator (α X) (# G f) (id₁ (G Y)))
 • (psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y)))
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) = ?t2

• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) = ?t2

 • (psnaturality_of α f ▹ id₁ (G Y)))
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) = ?t2

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

α: pstrans F G

f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(rinvunitor (α X · # G f)
 • id₂ (id₁ (G Y)) ⋆⋆ psnaturality_of α f)
• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) = ?t2

• rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y)) = ?t2

f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
psnaturality_of α f
• (rinvunitor (# F f · α Y)
   • rassociator (# F f) (α Y) (id₁ (G Y))) = ?t2

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f)
• (psnaturality_of α f • (# F f ◃ rinvunitor (α Y))) =
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
• ((id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y)
      • (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y)
         • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y)
            • (# F f
               ◃ (lunitor (α Y) • rinvunitor (α Y)))))))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f)
• (psnaturality_of α f • (# F f ◃ rinvunitor (α Y))) =
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
• ((id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y)
      • (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y)
         • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y)
            • ((# F f ◃ lunitor (α Y))
               • (# F f ◃ rinvunitor (α Y)))))))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f) • psnaturality_of α f)
• (# F f ◃ rinvunitor (α Y)) =
(((((rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
     • (id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f))
    • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y))
   • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y))
  • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y))
 • (# F f ◃ lunitor (α Y)))
• (# F f ◃ rinvunitor (α Y))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f) • psnaturality_of α f =
((((rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
    • (id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y))
• (# F f ◃ lunitor (α Y))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f) • psnaturality_of α f =
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
• ((id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y)
      • (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y)
         • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y)
            • (# F f ◃ lunitor (α Y))))))

F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂

X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
• ((id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y)
      • (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ α Y)
         • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y)
            • (# F f ◃ lunitor (α Y)))))) =
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f) • psnaturality_of α f

         • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y)

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y)
• (((lunitor (# F f) ▹ α Y)
    • (rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ α Y))
   • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y)
      • (# F f ◃ lunitor (α Y)))) = ?t2

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(((lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (α Y)
   • (lunitor (# F f) ▹ α Y))
  • (rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ α Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y))
• (# F f ◃ lunitor (α Y)) = ?t2

 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (α Y))
• (# F f ◃ lunitor (α Y)) = ?t2

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
• ((id₁ (F X) ◃ psnaturality_of α f)
   • lunitor (# F f · α Y)) =
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f) • psnaturality_of α f

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
• (lunitor (α X · # G f) • psnaturality_of α f) =
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f) • psnaturality_of α f

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
 • lunitor (α X · # G f)) • psnaturality_of α f =
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f) • psnaturality_of α f

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
• lunitor (α X · # G f) =
lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
• (lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (α X) (# G f)
   • (lunitor (α X) ▹ # G f)) =
lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(rassociator (id₁ (F X)) ((pr111 α) X) (# G f)
 • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (α X) (# G f))
• (lunitor (α X) ▹ # G f) =
lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F G
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
id₂ (id₁ (F X) · α X · # G f)
• (lunitor (α X) ▹ # G f) =
lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # G f

    apply id2_left.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
pstrans_data
  (comp_psfunctor
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) strictify)
  (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂))

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
pstrans_data
  (comp_psfunctor
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) strictify)
  (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ X : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
⟦ comp_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
    strictify X,
id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) X ⟧
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (?η₁ X · # (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) f · 
   ?η₁ Y)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ X : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
⟦ comp_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
    strictify X,
id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) X ⟧
 exact strictify_counit_comp.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (strictify_counit_comp X
   · # (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) f · strictify_counit_comp Y)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
invertible_2cell
  (strictify_counit_comp F
   · # (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)
  (# (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) α · strictify_counit_comp G)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
invertible_modification_data
  (strictify_counit_comp F
   · # (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)
  (# (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) α · strictify_counit_comp G)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
is_modification ?m

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
invertible_modification_data
  (strictify_counit_comp F
   · # (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)
  (# (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) α · strictify_counit_comp G)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
Z: B₁
invertible_2cell (id₁ (F Z) · (pr111 α) Z)
  (α Z · id₁ (G Z))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
Z: B₁
id₁ (F Z) · (pr111 α) Z ==> α Z · id₁ (G Z)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
Z: B₁
is_invertible_2cell ?η

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
Z: B₁
id₁ (F Z) · (pr111 α) Z ==> α Z · id₁ (G Z)
 exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
Z: B₁
is_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor ((pr111 α) Z) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Z))
 is_iso.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
is_modification
  ((λ Z : B₁,
    make_invertible_2cell
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor ((pr111 α) Z))
         (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Z)))
    :
    invertible_2cell
      ((strictify_counit_comp F
        · # (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)
         Z)
      ((# (comp_psfunctor
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
             strictify) α · strictify_counit_comp G) Z))
   :
   invertible_modification_data
     (strictify_counit_comp F
      · # (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
           strictify) α · strictify_counit_comp G))
 abstract (intros X Y f ; cbn ;
                  rewrite !vassocr ;
                  apply strict_counit_data_help).
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α, β: pstrans F₁ F₂
m: modification α β
X: B₁
(id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (pr111 m) X)
• (lunitor ((pr111 β) X) • rinvunitor ((pr111 β) X)) =
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X))
• (m X ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α, β: pstrans F₁ F₂
m: modification α β
X: B₁
(id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (pr111 m) X)
• (lunitor ((pr111 β) X) • rinvunitor ((pr111 β) X)) =
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X))
• (m X ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α, β: pstrans F₁ F₂
m: modification α β
X: B₁
((id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (pr111 m) X) • lunitor ((pr111 β) X))
• rinvunitor ((pr111 β) X) =
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X))
• (m X ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α, β: pstrans F₁ F₂
m: modification α β
X: B₁
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • (pr111 m) X)
• rinvunitor ((pr111 β) X) =
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X))
• (m X ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α, β: pstrans F₁ F₂
m: modification α β
X: B₁
lunitor ((pr111 α) X)
• ((pr111 m) X • rinvunitor ((pr111 β) X)) =
lunitor ((pr111 α) X)
• (rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X) • (m X ▹ id₁ (F₂ X)))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α, β: pstrans F₁ F₂
m: modification α β
X: B₁
lunitor ((pr111 α) X)
• (rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X)
   • id₂ (id₁ ((pr111 F₂) X)) ⋆⋆ (pr111 m) X) =
lunitor ((pr111 α) X)
• (rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X) • (m X ▹ id₁ (F₂ X)))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α, β: pstrans F₁ F₂
m: modification α β
X: B₁
lunitor ((pr111 α) X)
• (rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X)
   • id₂ (id₁ ((pr111 F₂) X)) ⋆⋆ (pr111 m) X) =
lunitor ((pr111 α) X)
• (rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X) • id₂ (id₁ (F₂ X)) ⋆⋆ m X)

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X: B₁
(id₁ (F X) ◃ id₂ (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))
• (lunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))
   • rinvunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))) =
(runitor (id₁ (F X)) • linvunitor (id₁ (F X)))
• ((pr111 (pr1
             (psfunctor_id
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) strictify) F))) X
   ▹ id₁ (F X))

   • rinvunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))) =
(runitor (id₁ (F X)) • linvunitor (id₁ (F X)))
• ((pr111 (pr1
             (psfunctor_id
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) strictify) F))) X
   ▹ id₁ (F X))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X: B₁
lunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))
• (id₂ (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))
   • rinvunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))) =

• (linvunitor (id₁ (F X))
   • ((pr111 (pr1

                         B₁ B₂) strictify) F))) X

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X: B₁
id₂ (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))
• rinvunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)) =
linvunitor (id₁ (F X))
• ((pr111 (pr1
             (psfunctor_id
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) strictify) F))) X
   ▹ id₁ (F X))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
β: pstrans F₂ F₃
X: B₁
(id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ id₂ ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X))
• (lunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X)
   • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X)) =
((((lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) ((pr111 α) X)
      ((pr111 β) X)
    • ((lunitor ((pr111 α) X)
        • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X)) ▹ (pr111 β) X))
   • rassociator
       ((pr111 (# (comp_psfunctor
                     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                        B₂) strictify) α)) X)
       (id₁ (F₂ X)) ((pr111 β) X))
  • ((pr111 (# (comp_psfunctor
                  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                  strictify) α)) X
     ◃ (lunitor ((pr111 β) X)
        • rinvunitor ((pr111 β) X))))
 • lassociator
     ((pr111 (# (comp_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) strictify) α)) X)
     ((pr111 (# (comp_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) strictify) β)) X)
     (id₁ (F₃ X)))
• ((pr111 ((pr222 (pr1
                     (comp_psfunctor
                        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                           B₁ B₂) strictify))) F₁ F₂
             F₃ α β)) X ▹ id₁ (F₃ X))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

  Opaque comp_psfunctor.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
is_pstrans strictify_counit_data

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
is_pstrans strictify_counit_data

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f g : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 strictify_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_on_cells
     (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)
• pr2 strictify_counit_data X Y g =
pr2 strictify_counit_data X Y f
• (psfunctor_on_cells
     (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) α ▹ pr1 strictify_counit_data Y)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ X : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
(pr1 strictify_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂))
     X) • pr2 strictify_counit_data X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 strictify_counit_data X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 strictify_counit_data X))
• (psfunctor_id
     (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) X ▹ 
   pr1 strictify_counit_data X)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y Z : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 strictify_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp
     (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) f g)
• pr2 strictify_counit_data X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 strictify_counit_data X)
      (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) f)
      (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) g)
    • (pr2 strictify_counit_data X Y f
       ▹ # (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) g))
   • rassociator
       (# (comp_psfunctor
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
             strictify) f)
       (pr1 strictify_counit_data Y)
       (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) g))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
          strictify) f
     ◃ pr2 strictify_counit_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
           strictify) f)
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
           strictify) g) 
     (pr1 strictify_counit_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) f g ▹ 
   pr1 strictify_counit_data Z)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f g : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 strictify_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_on_cells
     (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)
• pr2 strictify_counit_data X Y g =
pr2 strictify_counit_data X Y f
• (psfunctor_on_cells
     (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) α ▹ pr1 strictify_counit_data Y)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α, β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: α ==> β
(pr1 strictify_counit_data F₁
 ◃ psfunctor_on_cells
     (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) m)
• pr2 strictify_counit_data F₁ F₂ β =

• (psfunctor_on_cells
     (comp_psfunctor

        strictify) m ▹ pr1 strictify_counit_data F₂)

∏ (X Y Z : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)

((((lassociator (pr1 strictify_counit_data X)

       ▹ # (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) g))
   • rassociator
       (# (comp_psfunctor
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
             strictify) f)
       (pr1 strictify_counit_data Y)
       (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) g))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)

     ◃ pr2 strictify_counit_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
           strictify) f)
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
           strictify) g) (pr1 strictify_counit_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) f g ▹ pr1 strictify_counit_data Z)

   ▹ pr1 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) Y)

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
(id₁ (F X) ◃ psfunctor_on_cells F α)
• (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g)) =
(lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
• (psfunctor_on_cells F α ▹ id₁ (F Y))

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ X : B₁,
(pr1 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) X
 ◃ psfunctor_id
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
        (strictify_ob F)) X)

 • linvunitor
     (pr1 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) X))

   ▹ pr1 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) X)

• ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ id₁ (F X))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ (X Y Z : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (g : B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
        (strictify_ob F)) f g)
• pr2 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator
      (pr1 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) X)
      (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
            (strictify_ob F)) f)
      (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
            (strictify_ob F)) g)
    • (pr2 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) X Y f
       ▹ # (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
              (strictify_ob F)) g))
   • rassociator (# F f)
       (pr1 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) Y)
       (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂
             (strictify_ob F)) g))
  • (# F f
     ◃ pr2 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g)
     (pr1 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) Z))
• (psfunctor_comp F f g
   ▹ pr1 (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F) Z)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(id₁ (F X)
 ◃ strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob F) f g)
• (lunitor (# F (f · g)) • rinvunitor (# F (f · g))) =
((((lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (# F g)
    • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ # F g))
   • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ (F Z)))
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z))

?b

f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (# F g)
• ((lunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g)
   • (rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g)) = ?y'0

(lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (# F g)
 • (lunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g))
• (rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g) = ?y'0

          apply idpath.

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(((lunitor (# F f · # F g)
   • (# F f ◃ linvunitor (# F g)))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ (F Z)))
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z)) =
lunitor (# F f · # F g)
• (rinvunitor (# F f · # F g)
   • (strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob F) f g
      ▹ id₁ (F Z)))

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
lunitor (# F f · # F g)
• ((# F f ◃ linvunitor (# F g))
   • ((# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g)))
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ (F Z))
         • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z))))) =
lunitor (# F f · # F g)
• (rinvunitor (# F f · # F g)
   • (strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob F) f g
      ▹ id₁ (F Z)))

      • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z)))) =
rinvunitor (# F f · # F g)
• (strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob F) f g
   ▹ id₁ (F Z))

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
((# F f ◃ rinvunitor (# F g))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ (F Z)))
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z)) =

• (strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob F) f g
   ▹ id₁ (F Z))

f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z)) =

• (strict_psfunctor_comp_cell (strictify_ob F) f g
   ▹ id₁ (F Z))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z) =
idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 (strictify_ob F))) X Y Z f g)
▹ id₁ (F Z)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z) =
idtoiso_2_1
  (isotoid_2_1 HB₂_2_1 (psfunctor_comp F f g))
▹ id₁ (F Z)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g ▹ id₁ (F Z) =
psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ id₁ (F Z)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

invertible_2cell
  (?η₁ X
   · # (comp_psfunctor
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
          strictify) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) f · ?η₁ Y)

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  ((λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    make_pstrans (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F)
      (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F)) X
   · # (comp_psfunctor
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
          strictify) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) f
   · (λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
      make_pstrans (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F)
        (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F)) Y)

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
invertible_2cell
  ((λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    make_pstrans (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F)
      (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F)) F₁
   · # (comp_psfunctor
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
          strictify) α)
  (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
   · (λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
      make_pstrans (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F)
        (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F)) F₂)

invertible_modification_data
  ((λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    make_pstrans (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F)
      (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F)) F₁
   · # (comp_psfunctor
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)

  (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
   · (λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
invertible_modification_data
  ((λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    make_pstrans (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F)
      (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F)) F₁
   · # (comp_psfunctor
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
          strictify) α)
  (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
   · (λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
      make_pstrans (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F)
        (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F)) F₂)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X: B₁
invertible_2cell
  ((make_pstrans (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F₁)
      (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F₁)
    · # (comp_psfunctor
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
           strictify) α) X)
  ((# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
    · make_pstrans (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F₂)
        (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F₂)) X)

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X: B₁
id₁ (F₁ X) · α X ==> (pr111 α) X · id₁ (F₂ X)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X: B₁
is_invertible_2cell ?Goal

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X: B₁
id₁ (F₁ X) · α X ==> (pr111 α) X · id₁ (F₂ X)
 exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X: B₁
is_invertible_2cell (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))
 is_iso.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
is_modification
  ((λ X : B₁,
    make_invertible_2cell
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (α X))
         (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (α X))
       :
       is_invertible_2cell
         (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)
          :
          (make_pstrans
             (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F₁)
             (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F₁)
           · # (comp_psfunctor
                  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                  strictify) α) X ==>
          (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
           · make_pstrans
               (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F₂)
               (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans
                  F₂)) X)))
   :
   invertible_modification_data
     ((λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
       make_pstrans (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F)
         (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F)) F₁
      · # (comp_psfunctor
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
             strictify) α)
     (# (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
      · (λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
         make_pstrans
           (strictify_counit_inv_data_comp F)
           (strictify_counit_inv_data_is_pstrans F))
          F₂))
 abstract (intros X Y f ; cbn ;
                  rewrite !vassocr ;
                  apply strict_counit_data_help).
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
is_pstrans strictify_counit_inv_data

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
is_pstrans strictify_counit_inv_data

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f g : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 strictify_counit_inv_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_on_cells
     (comp_psfunctor
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
        strictify) α)
• pr2 strictify_counit_inv_data X Y g =
pr2 strictify_counit_inv_data X Y f
• (psfunctor_on_cells
     (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
   ▹ pr1 strictify_counit_inv_data Y)

α, β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: α ==> β
(pr1 strictify_counit_inv_data F₁
 ◃ psfunctor_on_cells

   ▹ pr1 strictify_counit_inv_data F₂)

((pr1 strictify_counit_inv_data F₁

F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
lunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X)
• rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
lunitor (α X · β X)
• ((rinvunitor (α X) ▹ β X)
   • (rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (β X)
      • (((pr111 α) X
          ◃ (lunitor (β X) • rinvunitor (β X)))
         • lassociator ((pr111 α) X) ((pr111 β) X)
             (id₁ (F₃ X)))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
(rinvunitor (α X) ▹ β X)
• (rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (β X)
   • (((pr111 α) X
       ◃ (lunitor (β X) • rinvunitor (β X)))
      • lassociator ((pr111 α) X) ((pr111 β) X)
          (id₁ (F₃ X))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
(rinvunitor (α X) ▹ β X)
• (rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (β X)
   • ((((pr111 α) X ◃ lunitor (β X))
       • ((pr111 α) X ◃ rinvunitor (β X)))
      • lassociator ((pr111 α) X) ((pr111 β) X)
          (id₁ (F₃ X))))

β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
(rinvunitor (α X) ▹ β X)
• (rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (β X)
   • (((pr111 α) X ◃ lunitor (β X))
      • (((pr111 α) X ◃ rinvunitor (β X))
         • lassociator ((pr111 α) X) ((pr111 β) X)
             (id₁ (F₃ X)))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
(rinvunitor (α X) ▹ β X)
• (rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (β X)
   • (((pr111 α) X ◃ lunitor (β X))
      • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X)))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
id₂ ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X)
• rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
(rinvunitor (α X) ▹ β X)
• (rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (β X)
   • (((pr111 α) X ◃ lunitor (β X))
      • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X)))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
id₂ ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X)
• rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
(((rinvunitor (α X) ▹ β X)
  • rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (β X))
 • ((pr111 α) X ◃ lunitor (β X)))
• rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X)

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
id₂ ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
((rinvunitor (α X) ▹ β X)
 • rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (β X))
• ((pr111 α) X ◃ lunitor (β X))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
id₂ ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
(rinvunitor (α X) ▹ β X)
• (rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (β X)
   • ((pr111 α) X ◃ lunitor (β X)))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
id₂ ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
(rinvunitor (α X) ▹ β X)
• (runitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ β X)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
id₂ ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
(rinvunitor (α X) • runitor ((pr111 α) X)) ▹ β X

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
id₂ ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
id₂ ((pr111 α) X) ▹ β X

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
β: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
X: B₁
id₂ ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X) =
id₂ ((pr111 α) X · β X)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (comp_psfunctor
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) strictify)

 exact strictify_counit_inv_data.

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

 exact strictify_counit_inv_is_pstrans.
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ (F X)) (id₁ (F X)) (# F f)
    • (id₁ (F X)
       ◃ (lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
     ▹ id₁ (F Y)))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (id₁ (F Y)))
• (# F f ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F Y))) =
((lunitor (id₁ (F X)) ▹ # F f) • lunitor (# F f))
• rinvunitor (# F f)

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ (F X)) (id₁ (F X)) (# F f)
    • (id₁ (F X)
       ◃ (lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
     ▹ id₁ (F Y)))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (id₁ (F Y)))
• (# F f ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F Y))) =
((lunitor (id₁ (F X)) ▹ # F f) • lunitor (# F f))
• rinvunitor (# F f)

       • (id₁ (F X) ◃ rinvunitor (# F f))))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
     ▹ id₁ (F Y)))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (id₁ (F Y)))

    • (id₁ (F X) ◃ rinvunitor (# F f)))

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(((((runitor (id₁ (F X)) ▹ # F f)
    • (id₁ (F X) ◃ rinvunitor (# F f)))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
     ▹ id₁ (F Y)))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (id₁ (F Y)))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(runitor (id₁ (F X)) ▹ # F f)
• ((id₁ (F X) ◃ rinvunitor (# F f))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (id₁ (F Y))
      • (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
          ▹ id₁ (F Y))
         • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y))
              (id₁ (F Y))
            • (# F f ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F Y))))))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (F X)) ▹ # F f)
• (lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(lunitor (id₁ (F X)) ▹ # F f)
• ((id₁ (F X) ◃ rinvunitor (# F f))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (id₁ (F Y))
      • (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
          ▹ id₁ (F Y))
         • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y))
              (id₁ (F Y))
            • (# F f ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F Y))))))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (F X)) ▹ # F f)
• (lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(id₁ (F X) ◃ rinvunitor (# F f))
• (lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (id₁ (F Y))
   • (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
       ▹ id₁ (F Y))
      • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (id₁ (F Y))
         • (# F f ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F Y)))))) =
lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)

F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((id₁ (F X) ◃ rinvunitor (# F f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F X)) (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)))
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
     ▹ id₁ (F Y)))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (id₁ (F Y)))
• (# F f ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F Y))) =
lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((rinvunitor (id₁ (F X) · # F f)
  • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
     ▹ id₁ (F Y)))
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (id₁ (F Y)))
• (# F f ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F Y))) =
lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rinvunitor (id₁ (F X) · # F f)
• (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ id₁ (F Y))
   • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (id₁ (F Y))
      • (# F f ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F Y))))) =
lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rinvunitor (id₁ (F X) · # F f)
• (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ id₁ (F Y))
   • (runitor (# F f) ▹ id₁ (F Y))) =
lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rinvunitor (id₁ (F X) · # F f)
• (((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
    • runitor (# F f)) ▹ id₁ (F Y)) =
lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rinvunitor (id₁ (F X) · # F f)
• ((lunitor (# F f)
    • (rinvunitor (# F f) • runitor (# F f)))
   ▹ id₁ (F Y)) = lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rinvunitor (id₁ (F X) · # F f)
• (lunitor (# F f) ▹ id₁ (F Y)) =
lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rinvunitor (id₁ (F X) · # F f)
• (lunitor (# F f) ▹ id₁ (F Y)) =
rinvunitor (id₁ (F X) · # F f)
• id₂ (id₁ (F Y)) ⋆⋆ lunitor (# F f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: functor_data B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rinvunitor (id₁ (F X) · # F f)
• id₂ (id₁ (F Y)) ⋆⋆ lunitor (# F f) =
rinvunitor (id₁ (F X) · # F f)
• id₂ (id₁ (F Y)) ⋆⋆ lunitor (# F f)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: functor_data B₁ B₂
α: nat_trans_data F₁ F₂
X: B₁
((((rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
    • (id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X)))
  • ((lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X)))
 • rassociator (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (id₁ (F₂ X)))
• (α X ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F₂ X))) =
((lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X) • lunitor (α X))
• rinvunitor (α X)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: functor_data B₁ B₂
α: nat_trans_data F₁ F₂
X: B₁
((((rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
    • (id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X)))
  • ((lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X)))
 • rassociator (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (id₁ (F₂ X)))
• (α X ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F₂ X))) =
((lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X) • lunitor (α X))
• rinvunitor (α X)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: functor_data B₁ B₂
α: nat_trans_data F₁ F₂
X: B₁
rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
• ((id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X))
      • (((lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))
          ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))
         • (rassociator (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X))
              (id₁ (F₂ X))
            • (α X ◃ lunitor (id₁ (F₂ X))))))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X)
• (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: functor_data B₁ B₂
α: nat_trans_data F₁ F₂
X: B₁
rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
• ((id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X))
      • (((lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))
          ▹ id₁ (F₂ X)) • (runitor (α X) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X)
• (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: functor_data B₁ B₂
α: nat_trans_data F₁ F₂
X: B₁
rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
• ((id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X))
      • (((lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))
          • runitor (α X)) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X)))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X)
• (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: functor_data B₁ B₂
α: nat_trans_data F₁ F₂
X: B₁
rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
• ((id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X))
      • ((lunitor (α X)
          • (rinvunitor (α X) • runitor (α X)))
         ▹ id₁ (F₂ X)))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X)
• (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: functor_data B₁ B₂
α: nat_trans_data F₁ F₂
X: B₁
rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
• ((id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X))
      • (lunitor (α X) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X)))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X)
• (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))

X: B₁
(lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X)
• (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)) =
rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
• ((id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X))
      • (lunitor (α X) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))))

X: B₁
(lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X)
• (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)) = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: functor_data B₁ B₂
α: nat_trans_data F₁ F₂
X: B₁
?b =
rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
• ((id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X))
      • (lunitor (α X) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))))

• (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)) = ?b

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

X: B₁
(lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X)
• (rinvunitor (id₁ (F₁ X) · α X)
   • (lunitor (α X) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))) = ?b

      apply idpath.

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

(lunitor (id₁ (F₁ X)) ▹ α X)
• (rinvunitor (id₁ (F₁ X) · α X)
   • (lunitor (α X) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))) =
rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
• ((id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X))
      • (lunitor (α X) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))))

 • rinvunitor (id₁ (F₁ X) · α X))
• (lunitor (α X) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X)) =
((rassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X)
  • (id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))))
 • lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (α X) (id₁ (F₂ X)))
• (lunitor (α X) ▹ id₁ (F₂ X))

 • (id₁ (F₁ X) ◃ (lunitor (α X) • rinvunitor (α X))))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
∏ a b : B₁,
B₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ B₂ ⟦ (λ X : B₁, F X) a, (λ X : B₁, F X) b ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ f, #F f).
  Defined.

  Local Definition pstrans_to_nattrans_data
        {F₁ F₂ : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
        (α : pstrans F₁ F₂)
    : nat_trans_data
        (psfunctor_to_functor_data F₁)
        (psfunctor_to_functor_data F₂)
    := λ X, α X.

  Local Definition strict_pstrans_to_nattrans_data
        {F₁ F₂ : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂}
        (α : F₁ --> F₂)
    : nat_trans_data
        (strict_psfunctor_to_functor_data F₁)
        (strict_psfunctor_to_functor_data F₂)
    := λ X, pr111 α X.

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
invertible_modification
  (comp_pstrans strictify_counit_inv strictify_counit)
  (id_pstrans (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)))
