B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
is_modification
  ((λ X : B₁,
    make_invertible_2cell
      (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ (F X)))
    :
    invertible_2cell
      (comp_pstrans strictify_counit_inv
         strictify_counit F X)
      (id_pstrans
         (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) F X))
   :
   invertible_modification_data
     (comp_pstrans strictify_counit_inv
        strictify_counit F)
     (id_pstrans
        (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) F))
 abstract (intros X Y f ; cbn ;
                  rewrite !vassocr ;
                  apply (modifications_help (psfunctor_to_functor_data F) X Y f)).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
is_modification
  ((λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    make_invertible_modification
      ((λ X : B₁,
        make_invertible_2cell
          (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ (F X)))
        :
        invertible_2cell
          (comp_pstrans strictify_counit_inv
             strictify_counit F X)
          (id_pstrans
             (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) F
             X))
       :
       invertible_modification_data
         (comp_pstrans strictify_counit_inv
            strictify_counit F)
         (id_pstrans
            (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) F))
      (strictify_counit_inv_strictify_counit_subproof
         F))
   :
   invertible_modification_data
     (comp_pstrans strictify_counit_inv
        strictify_counit)
     (id_pstrans
        (id_psfunctor (psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂))))
 abstract (intros F₁ F₂ α ;
                apply modification_eq ;
                intros X ; cbn ;
                rewrite !vassocr ;
                apply (modification_help_alt
                         (psfunctor_to_functor_data F₁)
                         (psfunctor_to_functor_data F₂)
                         (pstrans_to_nattrans_data α))).
  Defined.

        strictify))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X: B₁
is_invertible_2cell ?η

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X: B₁
id₁ (F X) · id₁ (F X) ==> id₁ (F X)
 exact (lunitor (id₁ _)).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X: B₁
is_invertible_2cell (lunitor (id₁ (F X)))
 is_iso.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
is_modification
  ((λ X : B₁,
    make_invertible_2cell
      (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ (F X)))
    :
    invertible_2cell
      (comp_pstrans strictify_counit
         strictify_counit_inv F X)
      (id_pstrans
         (comp_psfunctor
            (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
            strictify) F X))
   :
   invertible_modification_data
     (comp_pstrans strictify_counit
        strictify_counit_inv F)
     (id_pstrans
        (comp_psfunctor
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
           strictify) F))
 abstract (intros X Y f ; cbn ;
                  rewrite !vassocr ;
                  apply (modifications_help (psfunctor_to_functor_data F) X Y f)).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
is_modification
  ((λ F : psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    make_invertible_modification
      ((λ X : B₁,
        make_invertible_2cell
          (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ (F X)))
        :
        invertible_2cell
          (comp_pstrans strictify_counit
             strictify_counit_inv F X)
          (id_pstrans
             (comp_psfunctor
                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                strictify) F X))
       :
       invertible_modification_data
         (comp_pstrans strictify_counit
            strictify_counit_inv F)
         (id_pstrans
            (comp_psfunctor
               (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
               strictify) F))
      (strictify_counit_strictify_counit_inv_subproof
         F))
   :
   invertible_modification_data
     (comp_pstrans strictify_counit
        strictify_counit_inv)
     (id_pstrans
        (comp_psfunctor
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
           strictify)))
 abstract (intros F₁ F₂ α ;
                apply modification_eq ;
                intros X ; cbn ;
                rewrite !vassocr ;
                apply (modification_help_alt
                         (psfunctor_to_functor_data F₁)
                         (psfunctor_to_functor_data F₂)
                         (pstrans_to_nattrans_data α))).
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
((id₁ (F X) ◃ ## F α) • lunitor (# F g))
• rinvunitor (# F g) =
(lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
• (## F α ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Y))

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
((id₁ (F X) ◃ ## F α) • lunitor (# F g))
• rinvunitor (# F g) =
(lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
• (## F α ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Y))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
(lunitor (# F f) • ## F α) • rinvunitor (# F g) =
(lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
• (## F α ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Y))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
lunitor (# F f) • (## F α • rinvunitor (# F g)) =
lunitor (# F f)
• (rinvunitor (# F f) • (## F α ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
lunitor (# F f)
• (rinvunitor (# F f) • id₂ (id₁ (F Y)) ⋆⋆ ## F α) =
lunitor (# F f)
• (rinvunitor (# F f) • (## F α ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
lunitor (# F f)
• (rinvunitor (# F f) • id₂ (id₁ (F Y)) ⋆⋆ ## F α) =
lunitor (# F f)
• (rinvunitor (# F f)
   • id₂ (id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)) ⋆⋆ ## F α)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X: B₁
((id₁ (F X)
  ◃ psfunctor_id
      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) X)
 • lunitor (# F (id₁ X))) • rinvunitor (# F (id₁ X)) =
(runitor (id₁ (F X)) • linvunitor (id₁ (F X)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 (strict_psfunctor_id F X) ▹ id₁ (F X))

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X: B₁
((id₁ (F X)
  ◃ psfunctor_id
      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) X)
 • lunitor (# F (id₁ X))) • rinvunitor (# F (id₁ X)) =
(runitor (id₁ (F X)) • linvunitor (id₁ (F X)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 (strict_psfunctor_id F X) ▹ id₁ (F X))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X: B₁
(lunitor
   (id₁ (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
 • psfunctor_id
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) X)
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ X)) =
(runitor (id₁ (F X)) • linvunitor (id₁ (F X)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 (strict_psfunctor_id F X) ▹ id₁ (F X))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X: B₁
lunitor
  (id₁ (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
• (psfunctor_id
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) X
   • rinvunitor (# F (id₁ X))) =
runitor (id₁ (F X))
• (linvunitor (id₁ (F X))
   • (idtoiso_2_1 (strict_psfunctor_id F X)
      ▹ id₁ (F X)))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X: B₁
lunitor
  (id₁ (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
• (rinvunitor
     (id₁
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
   • id₂
       (id₁
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
     ⋆⋆ psfunctor_id
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F)
          X) =
runitor (id₁ (F X))
• (linvunitor (id₁ (F X))
   • (idtoiso_2_1 (strict_psfunctor_id F X)
      ▹ id₁ (F X)))

        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
   • id₂

          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
     ⋆⋆ psfunctor_id
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F)

runitor (id₁ (F X))
• (linvunitor (id₁ (F X))
   • id₂ (id₁ (F X))
     ⋆⋆ idtoiso_2_1 (strict_psfunctor_id F X))

• (rinvunitor
     (id₁
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
   • id₂
       (id₁
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
     ⋆⋆ psfunctor_id

  (id₁ (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
• (rinvunitor
     (id₁
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
   • id₂
       (id₁
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F X))
     ⋆⋆ psfunctor_id
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F)
          X) =
runitor (id₁ (F X))
• (rinvunitor (id₁ (F X))
   • id₂ (id₁ (F X))
     ⋆⋆ idtoiso_2_1 (strict_psfunctor_id F X))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
((id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
  ◃ psfunctor_comp
      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g)
 • lunitor (# F (f · g))) • rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
((((lassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)) (# F f) (# F g)
    • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ # F g))
   • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
((id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
  ◃ psfunctor_comp
      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g)
 • lunitor (# F (f · g))) • rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
((((lassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)) (# F f) (# F g)
    • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ # F g))
   • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(lunitor
   (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f
    · # (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) g)
 • psfunctor_comp
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g)
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
((((lassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)) (# F f) (# F g)
    • ((lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f)) ▹ # F g))
   • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(lunitor
   (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f
    · # (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) g)
 • psfunctor_comp
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g)
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
((((lassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)) (# F f) (# F g)
    • ((lunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g)
       • (rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g)))
   • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(lunitor
   (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f
    · # (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) g)
 • psfunctor_comp
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g)
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
(((((lassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)) (# F f) (# F g)
     • (lunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g))
    • (rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g))
   • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(lunitor
   (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f
    · # (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) g)
 • psfunctor_comp
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g)
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
((((lunitor (# F f · # F g)
    • (rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g))
   • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
lunitor
  (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f
   · # (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) g)
• (psfunctor_comp
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g
   • rinvunitor (# F (f · g))) =
lunitor (# F f · # F g)
• ((rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g)
   • (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g)
      • ((# F f
          ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g)))
         • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g)
              (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))
            • (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
               ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))))))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
psfunctor_comp
  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
(rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g)
• (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g)
   • ((# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g)))
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g)
           (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))
         • (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
            ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
psfunctor_comp
  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
((((rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ # F g)
   • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
psfunctor_comp
  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
(((id₂ (# F g) ⋆⋆ rinvunitor (# F f)
   • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
psfunctor_comp
  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
((linvunitor (# F g) ⋆⋆ id₂ (# F f)
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
psfunctor_comp
  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
(((# F f ◃ linvunitor (# F g))
  • (# F f ◃ (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
psfunctor_comp
  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
((# F f
  ◃ (linvunitor (# F g)
     • (lunitor (# F g) • rinvunitor (# F g))))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
psfunctor_comp
  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
((# F f
  ◃ ((linvunitor (# F g) • lunitor (# F g))
     • rinvunitor (# F g)))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
psfunctor_comp
  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
((# F f ◃ rinvunitor (# F g))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z)))
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
psfunctor_comp
  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g
• rinvunitor (# F (f · g)) =
rinvunitor (# F f · # F g)
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
rinvunitor
  (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f
   · # (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) g)
• id₂
    (id₁ (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F Z))
  ⋆⋆ psfunctor_comp
       (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g =
rinvunitor (# F f · # F g)
• (idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
X, Y, Z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
rinvunitor
  (# (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f
   · # (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) g)
• id₂
    (id₁ (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F Z))
  ⋆⋆ psfunctor_comp
       (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor_map B₁ B₂ F) f g =
rinvunitor (# F f · # F g)
• id₂ (id₁ ((pr111 F) Z))
  ⋆⋆ idtoiso_2_1 ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
      (# F₂ f)
    • (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X) ◃ (pr211 α) X Y f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F₁ f) • rinvunitor (# F₁ f))
     ▹ (pr111 α) Y))
 • rassociator (# F₁ f) (id₁ (F₁ Y)) ((pr111 α) Y))
• (# F₁ f
   ◃ (lunitor ((pr111 α) Y) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Y))) =
((((((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X))
     ▹ # F₂ f)
    • rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (# F₂ f))
   • ((pr111 α) X
      ◃ (lunitor (# F₂ f) • rinvunitor (# F₂ f))))
  • lassociator ((pr111 α) X) ((pr211 F₂) X Y f)
      (id₁ (F₂ Y)))
 • ((pr211 α) X Y f ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F₂) Y)))
• rassociator (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y) (id₁ (F₂ Y))

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
      (# F₂ f)
    • (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X) ◃ (pr211 α) X Y f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F₁ f) • rinvunitor (# F₁ f))
     ▹ (pr111 α) Y))
 • rassociator (# F₁ f) (id₁ (F₁ Y)) ((pr111 α) Y))
• (# F₁ f
   ◃ (lunitor ((pr111 α) Y) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Y))) =
((((((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X))
     ▹ # F₂ f)
    • rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (# F₂ f))
   • ((pr111 α) X
      ◃ (lunitor (# F₂ f) • rinvunitor (# F₂ f))))
  • lassociator ((pr111 α) X) ((pr211 F₂) X Y f)
      (id₁ (F₂ Y)))
 • ((pr211 α) X Y f ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F₂) Y)))
• rassociator (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y) (id₁ (F₂ Y))

• (# F₁ f
   ◃ (lunitor ((pr111 α) Y) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Y)))

B₁, B₂: bicat

?b =
((((rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) 
      ((pr111 α) X) (# F₂ f)
    • (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X) ◃ (pr211 α) X Y f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F₁ f) • rinvunitor (# F₁ f))
     ▹ (pr111 α) Y))
 • rassociator (# F₁ f) (id₁ (F₁ Y)) ((pr111 α) Y))
• (# F₁ f
   ◃ (lunitor ((pr111 α) Y) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Y)))

     ▹ # F₂ f)
    • rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ (F₂ X)) (# F₂ f))
   • ((pr111 α) X
      ◃ (lunitor (# F₂ f) • rinvunitor (# F₂ f))))
  • lassociator ((pr111 α) X) ((pr211 F₂) X Y f)

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(pr111 α) X
◃ ((linvunitor (# F₂ f) • lunitor (# F₂ f))
   • rinvunitor (# F₂ f)) = ?t2

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(pr111 α) X ◃ rinvunitor (# F₂ f) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # F₂ f)
 • ((pr111 α) X ◃ rinvunitor (# F₂ f)))
• lassociator ((pr111 α) X) ((pr211 F₂) X Y f)
    (id₁ (F₂ Y)) = ?y'0

   • lassociator ((pr111 α) X) ((pr211 F₂) X Y f)
       (id₁ (F₂ Y))) = ?y'0

   • id₂ (id₁ ((pr111 F₂) Y)) ⋆⋆ (pr211 α) X Y f) =

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # F₂ f)
 • ((pr211 α) X Y f
    • rinvunitor ((pr211 F₁) X Y f · (pr111 α) Y)))
• rassociator (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y) (id₁ (F₂ Y)) =
((((rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
      (# F₂ f)
    • (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X) ◃ (pr211 α) X Y f))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F₁ f) • rinvunitor (# F₁ f))
     ▹ (pr111 α) Y))
 • rassociator (# F₁ f) (id₁ (F₁ Y)) ((pr111 α) Y))
• (# F₁ f
   ◃ (lunitor ((pr111 α) Y) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Y)))

f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
((lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # F₂ f)
 • ((pr211 α) X Y f
    • rinvunitor ((pr211 F₁) X Y f · (pr111 α) Y)))
• rassociator (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y) (id₁ (F₂ Y)) = 
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

   • lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y))
  • ((lunitor (# F₁ f) • rinvunitor (# F₁ f))
     ▹ (pr111 α) Y))
 • rassociator (# F₁ f) (id₁ (F₁ Y)) ((pr111 α) Y))
• (# F₁ f
   ◃ (lunitor ((pr111 α) Y) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Y)))

• rassociator (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y) (id₁ (F₂ Y)) = 
?b

          ▹ (pr111 α) Y)
         • (runitor (# F₁ f) ▹ (pr111 α) Y)))) = ?b

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
  (# F₂ f)
• ((id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X) ◃ (pr211 α) X Y f)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y)
      • (((lunitor (# F₁ f) • rinvunitor (# F₁ f))
          • runitor (# F₁ f)) ▹ (pr111 α) Y))) = ?b

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
  (# F₂ f)
• ((id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X) ◃ (pr211 α) X Y f)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y)
      • ((lunitor (# F₁ f)
          • (rinvunitor (# F₁ f) • runitor (# F₁ f)))
         ▹ (pr111 α) Y))) = ?b

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
  (# F₂ f)
• ((id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X) ◃ (pr211 α) X Y f)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F₁ X)) (# F₁ f) ((pr111 α) Y)
      • (lunitor (# F₁ f) ▹ (pr111 α) Y))) = ?b

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
  (# F₂ f)
• ((id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X) ◃ (pr211 α) X Y f)
   • lunitor (# F₁ f · (pr111 α) Y)) = ?b

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
  (# F₂ f)
• (lunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr211 F₂) X Y f)
   • (pr211 α) X Y f) = ?b

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
   (# F₂ f) • lunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr211 F₂) X Y f))
• (pr211 α) X Y f = ?b

      apply idpath.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
   (# F₂ f) • lunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr211 F₂) X Y f))
• (pr211 α) X Y f =
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # F₂ f) • (pr211 α) X Y f

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
  (# F₂ f) • lunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr211 F₂) X Y f) =
lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # F₂ f

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
     (# F₂ f))
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
lunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr211 F₂) X Y f) =
?Hε ^-1 • (lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # F₂ f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X)) ((pr111 α) X)
     (# F₂ f))
 is_iso. 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
lunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr211 F₂) X Y f) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (id₁ ((pr111 F₁) X))
   ((pr111 α) X) (# F₂ f)) ^-1
• (lunitor ((pr111 α) X) ▹ # F₂ f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
lunitor ((pr111 α) X · (pr211 F₂) X Y f) =
lunitor ((pr111 α) X · # F₂ f)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat

pstrans_data
  (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂))
  (comp_psfunctor strictify
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂))

pstrans_data

     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂))

strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
⟦ id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) X,

  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) X ⟧
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (?η₁ X
   · # (comp_psfunctor strictify
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) f
   · ?η₁ Y)

⟦ id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) X,

  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) X ⟧

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
ps_base B₁ B₂
⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F),
pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
         (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F) ⟧
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
(λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
       ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                  (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F),
       pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                F) ⟧,
 pr211 (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
 f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F))
  ?pr1
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
pr121 (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
?pr1,, ?pr2] pr121 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                      B₁ B₂) F)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
pr122 (pr1
         (id_psfunctor 
            (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) -->[
?pr1,, ?pr2] pr122 (pr1
                      (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                      B₁ B₂) F))
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
(λ _ : pr122 (pr1
                (id_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) -->[
       ?pr1,, ?pr2] pr122 
       (pr1
          (comp_psfunctor strictify
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F)),
 pr222 (pr1
          (id_psfunctor 
             (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) -->[
 ?pr1,, ?pr2] pr222 (pr1
                      (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                      B₁ B₂) F))) 
  ?pr11

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
ps_base B₁ B₂
⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F),
pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
         (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F) ⟧
 exact (λ X, id₁ (pr111 F X)).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
(λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
       ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                  (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F),
       pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                F) ⟧,
 pr211 (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
 f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F))
  (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X))
 
B₁, B₂: bicat

F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂

f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  ((pr211 F) X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat

f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
id₁ ((pr111 F) X) · # F f ==>
(pr211 F) X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell ?η

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
id₁ ((pr111 F) X) · # F f ==>
(pr211 F) X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)
 exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor (# F f) • rinvunitor (# F f))
 is_iso.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
pr121 (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
(λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
  make_invertible_2cell
    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
       (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
       (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f)))
  :
  invertible_2cell
    (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
     · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                 (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                 F)) X Y f)
    ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
               (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) X Y
       f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
 :
 (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
        ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F),
        pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                 (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                 F) ⟧,
  pr211 (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
  f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
              (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F))
   (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))] pr121 (comp_psfunctor
                                            strictify
                                            (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                               B₁ B₂)
                                            F)
 abstract (intros X Y f g α ; cbn ;
                  rewrite !vassocr ;
                  apply strictify_unit_data_help1).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
pr122 (pr1
         (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
            F)) -->[
(λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
  make_invertible_2cell
    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
       (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
       (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f)))
  :
  invertible_2cell
    (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
     · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                 (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                 F)) X Y f)
    ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
               (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) X Y
       f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
 :
 (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
        ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F),
        pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                 (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                 F) ⟧,
  pr211 (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
  f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
              (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F))
   (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))] pr122 (pr1
                                            (comp_psfunctor
                                               strictify
                                               (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                                 B₁ B₂)
                                               F))
 abstract (intros X ; cbn ;
                  rewrite idtoiso_2_1_isotoid_2_1 ;
                  rewrite !vassocr ;
                  apply strictify_unit_data_help2).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
(λ _ : pr122 (pr1
                (id_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) -->[
       (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
       ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         make_invertible_2cell
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f)))
         :
         invertible_2cell
           (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
            · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                           B₁ B₂) F)) X Y f)
           ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
                      (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
              X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
        :
        (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
               ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                          (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                             B₂) F),
               pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                           B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
         pr211 (id_psfunctor
                  (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
         f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                        B₂) F))
          (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))] pr122 (pr1
                                                 (comp_psfunctor
                                                 strictify
                                                 (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                                 B₁ B₂)
                                                 F)),
 pr222 (pr1
          (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
             F)) -->[
 (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
 ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
   make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f)))
   :
   invertible_2cell
     (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
      · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                  F)) X Y f)
     ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
                (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) X Y
        f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
  :
  (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
         ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                    (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F),
         pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                  F) ⟧,
   pr211 (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
            F) -->[
   f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
               (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F))
    (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))] pr222 (pr1
                                             (comp_psfunctor
                                                strictify
                                                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                                 B₁ B₂)
                                                F)))
  (strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F)
 abstract (intros X Y Z f g ; cbn ;
                  rewrite idtoiso_2_1_isotoid_2_1 ;
                  rewrite !vassocr ;
                  apply strictify_unit_data_help3).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
      ((λ (X0 Y0 : B₁) (f0 : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),
        make_invertible_2cell
          (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f0))
             (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f0)))
        :
        invertible_2cell
          (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
           · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                       (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                          B₁ B₂) F)) X0 Y0 f0)
          ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
                     (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
             X0 Y0 f0 · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y0)))
       :
       (λ f0 : ps_base B₁ B₂
               ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                          (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                             B₂) F),
               pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                           B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
        pr211 (id_psfunctor
                 (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
        f0] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                        B₂) F))
         (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
     strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
     strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
     strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) X
   · # (comp_psfunctor strictify
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) f
   · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
      (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
        ((λ (X0 Y0 : B₁) (f0 : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),
          make_invertible_2cell
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f0))
               (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                  (# F f0)))
          :
          invertible_2cell
            (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
             · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                            B₁ B₂) F)) X0 Y0 f0)
            ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
                       (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                       F)) X0 Y0 f0
             · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y0)))
         :
         (λ f0 : ps_base B₁ B₂
                 ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                            (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                               B₂) F),
                 pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                             B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
          pr211 (id_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
          f0] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                       (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                          B₁ B₂) F))
           (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
       strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
       strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
       strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) Y)

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
invertible_2cell
  ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
      ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
        make_invertible_2cell
          (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
             (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f)))
        :
        invertible_2cell
          (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
           · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                       (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                          B₁ B₂) F)) X Y f)
          ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
                     (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
             X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
       :
       (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
              ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                         (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                         F),
              pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                       (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                          B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
        pr211 (id_psfunctor
                 (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
        f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                    (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                       B₂) F))
         (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
     strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
     strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
     strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₁
   · # (comp_psfunctor strictify
          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) α)
  (# (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
   · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
      (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
        ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
          make_invertible_2cell
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
               (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f)))
          :
          invertible_2cell
            (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
             · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                            B₁ B₂) F)) X Y f)
            ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
                       (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                       F)) X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
         :
         (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                           (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                              B₂) F),
                pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                            B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
          pr211 (id_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
          f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                         B₁ B₂) F))
           (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
       strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
       strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
       strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₂)

α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
(λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
 (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
   ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     make_invertible_2cell
       (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
          (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
          (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f)))
     :
     invertible_2cell
       (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
        · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                    (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                       B₂) F)) X Y f)
       ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
                  (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) X
          Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
    :
    (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
           ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                      (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F),
           pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                    (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                       B₂) F) ⟧,
     pr211 (id_psfunctor
              (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
     f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                 (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                 F)) (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
  strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
  strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
  strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₁
· # (comp_psfunctor strictify
       (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) α ==>
# (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
· (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
   (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
     ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
       make_invertible_2cell
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
            (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f)))
       :
       invertible_2cell
         (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
          · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                         B₁ B₂) F)) X Y f)
         ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
                    (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
            X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
      :
      (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
             ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                        (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                        F),
             pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                         B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
       pr211 (id_psfunctor
                (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
       f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) F))
        (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
    strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
    strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
    strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₂

α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
(λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
 (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
   ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     make_invertible_2cell
       (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
          (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
          (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f)))
     :
     invertible_2cell
       (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
        · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                    (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                       B₂) F)) X Y f)
       ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
                  (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) X
          Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
    :
    (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
           ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                      (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F),
           pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                    (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                       B₂) F) ⟧,
     pr211 (id_psfunctor
              (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
     f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                 (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                 F)) (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
  strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
  strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
  strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₁
· # (comp_psfunctor strictify
       (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) α ==>
# (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
· (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
   (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
     ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
       make_invertible_2cell
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
            (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f)))
       :
       invertible_2cell
         (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
          · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                         B₁ B₂) F)) X Y f)
         ((pr211 (id_psfunctor
                    (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
            X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
      :
      (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
             ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                        (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                        F),
             pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                         B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
       pr211 (id_psfunctor
                (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
       f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) F))
        (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
    strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
    strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
    strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₂
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
∏ X : B₁,
(pr111 ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
         (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
           ((λ (X0 Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y ⟧),
             make_invertible_2cell
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
                  (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                     (# F f)))
             :
             invertible_2cell
               (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
                · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                            (...) F)) X0 Y f)
               ((pr211 (id_psfunctor (...) F)) X0 Y f
                · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
            :
            (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                   ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                              (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                 B₁ B₂) F),
                   pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                            (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                               B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
             pr211 (id_psfunctor
                      (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
             f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                            B₁ B₂) F))
              (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
          strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
          strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
          strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₁
        · # (comp_psfunctor strictify
               (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂))
            α)) X ==>
(pr111 (# (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂))
          α
        · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
           (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
             ((λ (X0 Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y ⟧),
               make_invertible_2cell
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                    (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                       (# F f))
                    (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                       (# F f)))
               :
               invertible_2cell
                 (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
                  · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                              (...) F)) X0 Y f)
                 ((pr211 (id_psfunctor (...) F)) X0 Y
                    f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
              :
              (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                     ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                                (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                   B₁ B₂) F),
                     pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                              (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                 B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
               pr211 (id_psfunctor
                        (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                        F) -->[
               f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                              B₁ B₂) F))
                (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
            strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
            strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
            strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₂))
  X

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
∏ X : B₁,
(pr111 ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
         (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
           ((λ (X0 Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y ⟧),
             make_invertible_2cell
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
                  (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                     (# F f)))
             :
             invertible_2cell
               (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
                · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                            (...) F)) X0 Y f)
               ((pr211 (id_psfunctor (...) F)) X0 Y f
                · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
            :
            (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                   ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                              (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                 B₁ B₂) F),
                   pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                            (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                               B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
             pr211 (id_psfunctor
                      (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) -->[
             f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                            B₁ B₂) F))
              (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
          strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
          strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
          strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₁
        · # (comp_psfunctor strictify
               (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂))
            α)) X ==>
(pr111 (# (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂))
          α
        · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
           (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
             ((λ (X0 Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y ⟧),
               make_invertible_2cell
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                    (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                       (# F f))
                    (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                       (# F f)))
               :
               invertible_2cell
                 (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
                  · (pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                              (...) F)) X0 Y f)
                 ((pr211 (id_psfunctor (...) F)) X0 Y
                    f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
              :
              (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                     ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor
                                (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                   B₁ B₂) F),
                     pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                              (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                 B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
               pr211 (id_psfunctor
                        (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                        F) -->[
               f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                              B₁ B₂) F))
                (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
            strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
            strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
            strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₂))
  X
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
Z: B₁
id₁ ((pr111 F₁) Z) · (pr111 α) Z ==>
(pr111 α) Z · id₁ ((pr111 F₂) Z)

          exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
is_strict_modification
  (λ Z : B₁,
   lunitor ((pr111 α) Z) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Z)
   :
   (pr111 ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
            (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
              ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                make_invertible_2cell
                  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                     (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor ...)
                     (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                        ...))
                :
                invertible_2cell
                  (id₁ (...) · (pr211 ...) X Y f)
                  ((pr211 ...) X Y f · id₁ (...)))
               :
               (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                      ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor (...) F),
                      pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                               (...) F) ⟧,
                pr211 (id_psfunctor
                         (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                         F) -->[
                f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                            (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                               B₁ B₂) F))
                 (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
             strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
             strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
             strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₁
           · # (comp_psfunctor strictify
                  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂))
               α)) Z ==>
   (pr111 (# (id_psfunctor
                (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
           · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
              (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
                ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                  make_invertible_2cell
                    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                       (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                          ...)
                       (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                          ...))
                  :
                  invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ (...) · (pr211 ...) X Y f)
                    ((pr211 ...) X Y f · id₁ (...)))
                 :
                 (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                        ⟦ pr111 (id_psfunctor (...) F),
                        pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                                 strictify (...) F) ⟧,
                  pr211 (id_psfunctor
                           (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                              B₂) F) -->[
                  f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                              (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                 B₁ B₂) F))
                   (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
               strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
               strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
               strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt)
               F₂)) Z)
 abstract (intros X Y f ; cbn ;
                    rewrite !vassocr ;
                    apply strictify_unit_data_help4).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (make_strict_modification
     (λ Z : B₁,
      lunitor ((pr111 α) Z) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Z)
      :
      (pr111 ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
               (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
                 ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                   make_invertible_2cell
                     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp ...
                        ...)
                   :
                   invertible_2cell (... · ...)
                     (... · ...))
                  :
                  (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂ ⟦ pr111 (...),
                         pr111 (...) ⟧,
                   pr211 (id_psfunctor ... F) -->[
                   f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                               ... F))
                    (λ X : B₁, id₁ (... X)))),,
                strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
                strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
                strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),, tt)
                F₁
              · # (comp_psfunctor strictify
                     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                        B₂)) α)) Z ==>
      (pr111 (# (id_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α
              · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
                 (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
                   ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                     make_invertible_2cell
                       (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp ...
                          ...)
                     :
                     invertible_2cell (... · ...)
                       (... · ...))
                    :
                    (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                           ⟦ pr111 (...), pr111 (...)
                           ⟧,
                     pr211 (id_psfunctor ... F) -->[
                     f] pr211 (comp_psfunctor
                                 strictify ... F))
                      (λ X : B₁, id₁ (... X)))),,
                  strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
                  strictify_unit_data_subproof0 F,,
                  strictify_unit_data_subproof1 F),,
                 tt) F₂)) Z)
     (strictify_unit_data_subproof2 F₁ F₂ α))

α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
∏ X : B₁,
is_invertible_2cell
  ((pr111 (make_strict_modification
             (λ Z : B₁,
              lunitor ((pr111 α) Z)
              • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Z)
              :
              (pr111 ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                               B₂,
                       (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ (...)),,
                         ((λ ... ..., ...)
                          :
                          (...) (...))),,
                        strictify_unit_data_subproof F,,
                        strictify_unit_data_subproof0
                          F,,
                        strictify_unit_data_subproof1
                          F),, tt) F₁
                      · # (comp_psfunctor strictify
                             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                B₁ B₂)) α)) Z ==>
              (pr111 (# (id_psfunctor
                           (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                              B₂)) α
                      · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                 B₁ B₂,
                         (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ (...)),,
                           ((λ ... ..., ...)
                            :
                            (...) (...))),,
                          strictify_unit_data_subproof
                            F,,
                          strictify_unit_data_subproof0
                            F,,
                          strictify_unit_data_subproof1
                            F),, tt) F₂)) Z)
             (strictify_unit_data_subproof2 F₁ F₂ α)))
     X)

    • ((lunitor ((pr111 α) X)
        • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X)) ▹ (pr111 β) X))
   • rassociator ((pr111 α) X) (id₁ ((pr111 F₂) X))
       ((pr111 β) X))
  • ((pr111 α) X
     ◃ (lunitor ((pr111 β) X)
        • rinvunitor ((pr111 β) X))))
 • lassociator ((pr111 α) X) ((pr111 β) X)
     (id₁ ((pr111 F₃) X)))
• (id₂ ((pr111 α) X · (pr111 β) X)
   ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F₃) X))

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
invertible_2cell (id₁ ((pr111 F) X) · (pr211 F) X Y f)
  (# F f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y))

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
id₁ ((pr111 F) X) · (pr211 F) X Y f ==>
# F f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
id₁ ((pr111 F) X) · (pr211 F) X Y f ==>
# F f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)
 exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X, Y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor ((pr211 F) X Y f)
   • rinvunitor ((pr211 F) X Y f))
 is_iso.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
pr121 (comp_psfunctor strictify
         (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F) -->[
(λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
  make_invertible_2cell
    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
       (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor ((pr211 F) X Y f))
       (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
          ((pr211 F) X Y f)))
  :
  invertible_2cell
    (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
     · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                 (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) X
         Y f)
    ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
               (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F))
       X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
 :
 (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
        ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) F),
        pr111 (id_psfunctor
                 (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
  pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F) -->[
  f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
              (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
   (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))] pr121 (id_psfunctor
                                            (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                               B₁ B₂)
                                            F)
 abstract (intros X Y f g α ; cbn ;
                  rewrite !vassocr ;
                  apply strictify_unit_data_help1).
