HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
pr122 (pr1
         (comp_psfunctor strictify
            (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F)) -->[
(λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
  make_invertible_2cell
    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
       (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor ((pr211 F) X Y f))
       (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
          ((pr211 F) X Y f)))
  :
  invertible_2cell
    (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
     · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                 (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) X
         Y f)
    ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
               (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F))
       X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
 :
 (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
        ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) F),
        pr111 (id_psfunctor
                 (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
  pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F) -->[
  f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
              (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
   (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))] pr122 (pr1
                                            (id_psfunctor
                                               (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                                 B₁ B₂)
                                               F))
 abstract (intros X ; cbn ;
                  rewrite idtoiso_2_1_isotoid_2_1 ;
                  rewrite !vassocr ;
                  apply strictify_unit_data_help2).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
(λ _ : pr122 (pr1
                (comp_psfunctor strictify
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) F)) -->[
       (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
       ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
         make_invertible_2cell
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                 ((pr211 F) X Y f))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                 ((pr211 F) X Y f)))
         :
         invertible_2cell
           (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
            · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                        (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                        F)) X Y f)
           ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                         B₁ B₂) F)) X Y f
            · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
        :
        (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
               ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                             B₁ B₂) F),
               pr111 (id_psfunctor
                        (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                        F) ⟧,
         pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                  F) -->[
         f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                     (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
          (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))] pr122 (pr1
                                                 (id_psfunctor
                                                 (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                                 B₁ B₂)
                                                 F)),
 pr222 (pr1
          (comp_psfunctor strictify
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F)) -->[
 (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
 ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
   make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor ((pr211 F) X Y f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
           ((pr211 F) X Y f)))
   :
   invertible_2cell
     (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
      · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                  (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)) X
          Y f)
     ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                F)) X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
  :
  (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
         ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                    (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                       B₂) F),
         pr111 (id_psfunctor
                  (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
   pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
            (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F) -->[
   f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
               (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
    (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))] pr222 (pr1
                                             (id_psfunctor
                                                (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                                 B₁ B₂)
                                                F)))
  (strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F)
 abstract (intros X Y Z f g ; cbn ;
                  rewrite idtoiso_2_1_isotoid_2_1 ;
                  rewrite !vassocr ;
                  apply strictify_unit_data_help3).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
      ((λ (X0 Y0 : B₁) (f0 : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),
        make_invertible_2cell
          (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                ((pr211 F) X0 Y0 f0))
             (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                ((pr211 F) X0 Y0 f0)))
        :
        invertible_2cell
          (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
           · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                       (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                       F)) X0 Y0 f0)
          ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                        B₂) F)) X0 Y0 f0
           · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y0)))
       :
       (λ f0 : ps_base B₁ B₂
               ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                             B₁ B₂) F),
               pr111 (id_psfunctor
                        (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                        F) ⟧,
        pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                 (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                 F) -->[
        f0] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                     (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
         (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
     strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
     strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
     strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt) X
   · # (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor strictify
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) f
   · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
      (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
        ((λ (X0 Y0 : B₁) (f0 : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),
          make_invertible_2cell
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                  ((pr211 F) X0 Y0 f0))
               (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                  ((pr211 F) X0 Y0 f0)))
          :
          invertible_2cell
            (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
             · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                         (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                         F)) X0 Y0 f0)
            ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                       (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                          B₁ B₂) F)) X0 Y0 f0
             · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y0)))
         :
         (λ f0 : ps_base B₁ B₂
                 ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                            (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                               B₁ B₂) F),
                 pr111 (id_psfunctor
                          (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                             B₂) F) ⟧,
          pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) F) -->[
          f0] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                       (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                       F))
           (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
       strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
       strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
       strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt) Y)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
invertible_2cell
  ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
      ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
        make_invertible_2cell
          (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                ((pr211 F) X Y f))
             (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                ((pr211 F) X Y f)))
        :
        invertible_2cell
          (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
           · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                       (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                       F)) X Y f)
          ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                        B₂) F)) X Y f
           · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
       :
       (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
              ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                            B₁ B₂) F),
              pr111 (id_psfunctor
                       (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                       F) ⟧,
        pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                 (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                 F) -->[
        f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                    (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
         (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
     strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
     strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
     strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₁
   · # (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)
  (# (comp_psfunctor strictify
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) α
   · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
      (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
        ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
          make_invertible_2cell
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                  ((pr211 F) X Y f))
               (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                  ((pr211 F) X Y f)))
          :
          invertible_2cell
            (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
             · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                         (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                         F)) X Y f)
            ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                       (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                          B₁ B₂) F)) X Y f
             · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
         :
         (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                              B₁ B₂) F),
                pr111 (id_psfunctor
                         (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                         F) ⟧,
          pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂) F) -->[
          f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                      (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
           (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
       strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
       strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
       strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₂)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
(λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
 (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
   ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     make_invertible_2cell
       (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
          (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
             ((pr211 F) X Y f))
          (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
             ((pr211 F) X Y f)))
     :
     invertible_2cell
       (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
        · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                    (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
            X Y f)
       ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                  F)) X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
    :
    (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
           ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                         B₁ B₂) F),
           pr111 (id_psfunctor
                    (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)
           ⟧,
     pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
              (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F) -->[
     f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                 (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
      (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
  strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
  strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
  strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₁
· # (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α ==>
# (comp_psfunctor strictify
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) α
· (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
   (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
     ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
       make_invertible_2cell
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
               ((pr211 F) X Y f))
            (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
               ((pr211 F) X Y f)))
       :
       invertible_2cell
         (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
          · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                      (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
              X Y f)
         ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                    (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                       B₂) F)) X Y f
          · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
      :
      (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
             ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                           B₁ B₂) F),
             pr111 (id_psfunctor
                      (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)
             ⟧,
       pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                F) -->[
       f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
        (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
    strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
    strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
    strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₂
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell ?η

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
(λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
 (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
   ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     make_invertible_2cell
       (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
          (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
             ((pr211 F) X Y f))
          (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
             ((pr211 F) X Y f)))
     :
     invertible_2cell
       (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
        · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                    (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
            X Y f)
       ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                  (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                  F)) X Y f · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
    :
    (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
           ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                         B₁ B₂) F),
           pr111 (id_psfunctor
                    (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)
           ⟧,
     pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
              (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂) F) -->[
     f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                 (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
      (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
  strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
  strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
  strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₁
· # (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α ==>
# (comp_psfunctor strictify
     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) α
· (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
   (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
     ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
       make_invertible_2cell
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
               ((pr211 F) X Y f))
            (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
               ((pr211 F) X Y f)))
       :
       invertible_2cell
         (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)
          · (pr211 (id_psfunctor
                      (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
              X Y f)
         ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                    (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                       B₂) F)) X Y f
          · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
      :
      (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
             ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                           B₁ B₂) F),
             pr111 (id_psfunctor
                      (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F)
             ⟧,
       pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)
                F) -->[
       f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂) F))
        (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
    strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
    strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
    strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt) F₂
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
∏ X : B₁,
(pr111 ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
         (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
           ((λ (X0 Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y ⟧),
             make_invertible_2cell
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                     ((pr211 F) X0 Y f))
                  (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                     ((pr211 F) X0 Y f)))
             :
             invertible_2cell
               (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
                · (pr211 (id_psfunctor (...) F)) X0 Y
                    f)
               ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify (...)
                          F)) X0 Y f
                · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
            :
            (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                   ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                              (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                 B₁ B₂) F),
                   pr111 (id_psfunctor
                            (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                               B₂) F) ⟧,
             pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                         B₁ B₂) F) -->[
             f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                         (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                         F))
              (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
          strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
          strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
          strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt)
          F₁
        · # (id_psfunctor
               (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)) X ==>
(pr111 (# (comp_psfunctor strictify
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) α
        · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
           (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
             ((λ (X0 Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y ⟧),
               make_invertible_2cell
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                    (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                       ((pr211 F) X0 Y f))
                    (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                       ((pr211 F) X0 Y f)))
               :
               invertible_2cell
                 (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
                  · (pr211 (id_psfunctor (...) F)) X0
                      Y f)
                 ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                            (...) F)) X0 Y f
                  · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
              :
              (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                     ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                   B₁ B₂) F),
                     pr111 (id_psfunctor
                              (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                 B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
               pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                           B₁ B₂) F) -->[
               f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                           (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                              B₂) F))
                (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
            strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
            strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
            strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt)
            F₂)) X

α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
is_strict_modification ?m

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
∏ X : B₁,
(pr111 ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
         (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
           ((λ (X0 Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y ⟧),
             make_invertible_2cell
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                     ((pr211 F) X0 Y f))
                  (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                     ((pr211 F) X0 Y f)))
             :
             invertible_2cell
               (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
                · (pr211 (id_psfunctor (...) F)) X0 Y
                    f)
               ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify (...)
                          F)) X0 Y f
                · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
            :
            (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                   ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                              (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                 B₁ B₂) F),
                   pr111 (id_psfunctor
                            (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                               B₂) F) ⟧,
             pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                      (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                         B₁ B₂) F) -->[
             f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                         (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
                         F))
              (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
          strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
          strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
          strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt)
          F₁
        · # (id_psfunctor
               (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)) X ==>
(pr111 (# (comp_psfunctor strictify
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) α
        · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
           (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)),,
             ((λ (X0 Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X0, Y ⟧),
               make_invertible_2cell
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                    (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                       ((pr211 F) X0 Y f))
                    (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                       ((pr211 F) X0 Y f)))
               :
               invertible_2cell
                 (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)
                  · (pr211 (id_psfunctor (...) F)) X0
                      Y f)
                 ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                            (...) F)) X0 Y f
                  · id₁ ((pr111 F) Y)))
              :
              (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                     ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                                   B₁ B₂) F),
                     pr111 (id_psfunctor
                              (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                 B₁ B₂) F) ⟧,
               pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                           B₁ B₂) F) -->[
               f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                           (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                              B₂) F))
                (λ X0 : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X0)))),,
            strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
            strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
            strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt)
            F₂)) X
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
Z: B₁
id₁ ((pr111 F₁) Z) · (pr111 α) Z ==>
(pr111 α) Z · id₁ ((pr111 F₂) Z)

          exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
is_strict_modification
  (λ Z : B₁,
   lunitor ((pr111 α) Z) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Z)
   :
   (pr111 ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
            (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
              ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                make_invertible_2cell
                  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                     (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor ...)
                     (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                        ...))
                :
                invertible_2cell
                  (id₁ (...) · (pr211 ...) X Y f)
                  ((pr211 ...) X Y f · id₁ (...)))
               :
               (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                      ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                                 strictify (...) F),
                      pr111 (id_psfunctor (...) F) ⟧,
                pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                            B₁ B₂) F) -->[
                f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                            (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                               B₂) F))
                 (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
             strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
             strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
             strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),, tt)
             F₁
           · # (id_psfunctor
                  (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α))
     Z ==>
   (pr111 (# (comp_psfunctor strictify
                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂))
             α
           · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
              (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
                ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                  make_invertible_2cell
                    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                       (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
                          ...)
                       (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
                          ...))
                  :
                  invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ (...) · (pr211 ...) X Y f)
                    ((pr211 ...) X Y f · id₁ (...)))
                 :
                 (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                        ⟦ pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                                   strictify (...) F),
                        pr111 (id_psfunctor (...) F) ⟧,
                  pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                              B₁ B₂) F) -->[
                  f] pr211 (id_psfunctor
                              (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                 B₁ B₂) F))
                   (λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))),,
               strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
               strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
               strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),,
              tt) F₂)) Z)
 abstract (intros X Y f ; cbn ;
                    rewrite !vassocr ;
                    apply strictify_unit_data_help4).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (make_strict_modification
     (λ Z : B₁,
      lunitor ((pr111 α) Z) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Z)
      :
      (pr111 ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
               (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
                 ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                   make_invertible_2cell
                     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp ...
                        ...)
                   :
                   invertible_2cell (... · ...)
                     (... · ...))
                  :
                  (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂ ⟦ pr111 (...),
                         pr111 (...) ⟧,
                   pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify ...
                            F) -->[
                   f] pr211 (id_psfunctor ... F))
                    (λ X : B₁, id₁ (... X)))),,
                strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
                strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
                strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),,
               tt) F₁
              · # (id_psfunctor
                     (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α))
        Z ==>
      (pr111 (# (comp_psfunctor strictify
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂)) α
              · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
                 (((λ X : B₁, id₁ ((pr111 F) X)),,
                   ((λ (X Y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                     make_invertible_2cell
                       (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp ...
                          ...)
                     :
                     invertible_2cell (... · ...)
                       (... · ...))
                    :
                    (λ f : ps_base B₁ B₂
                           ⟦ pr111 (...), pr111 (...)
                           ⟧,
                     pr211 (comp_psfunctor strictify
                              ... F) -->[
                     f] pr211 (id_psfunctor ... F))
                      (λ X : B₁, id₁ (... X)))),,
                  strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof F,,
                  strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0 F,,
                  strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1 F),,
                 tt) F₂)) Z)
     (strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof2 F₁ F₂ α))
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F₁, F₂: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
α: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
∏ X : B₁,
is_invertible_2cell
  ((pr111 (make_strict_modification
             (λ Z : B₁,
              lunitor ((pr111 α) Z)
              • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) Z)
              :
              (pr111 ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                               B₂,
                       (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ (...)),,
                         ((λ ... ..., ...)
                          :
                          (...) (...))),,
                        strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof
                          F,,
                        strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0
                          F,,
                        strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1
                          F),, tt) F₁
                      · # (id_psfunctor
                             (strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                B₁ B₂)) α)) Z ==>
              (pr111 (# (comp_psfunctor strictify
                           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                              B₁ B₂)) α
                      · (λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat
                                 B₁ B₂,
                         (((λ X0 : B₁, id₁ (...)),,
                           ((λ ... ..., ...)
                            :
                            (...) (...))),,
                          strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof
                            F,,
                          strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof0
                            F,,
                          strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof1
                            F),, tt) F₂)) Z)
             (strictify_unit_inv_data_subproof2 F₁ F₂
                α))) X)

m: α ==> β

• (lunitor ((pr111 β) X) • rinvunitor ((pr111 β) X)) =
(lunitor ((pr111 α) X) • rinvunitor ((pr111 α) X))
• ((pr111 m) X ▹ id₁ ((pr111 F₂) X))

B₁, B₂: bicat

is_pstrans strictify_unit_inv_data

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
is_pstrans strictify_unit_inv_data

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f g : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(α : f ==> g),
(pr1 strictify_unit_inv_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_on_cells
     (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) α)
• pr2 strictify_unit_inv_data X Y g =
pr2 strictify_unit_inv_data X Y f
• (psfunctor_on_cells
     (comp_psfunctor strictify
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) α
   ▹ pr1 strictify_unit_inv_data Y)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ X : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
(pr1 strictify_unit_inv_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_id
     (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) X)
• pr2 strictify_unit_inv_data X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 strictify_unit_inv_data X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 strictify_unit_inv_data X))
• (psfunctor_id
     (comp_psfunctor strictify
        (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) X
   ▹ pr1 strictify_unit_inv_data X)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
∏ (X Y Z : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)
(f : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂ ⟦ X, Y ⟧)

         ◃ psfunctor_comp
             (id_psfunctor

  X =

                     (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                        B₂)) α)

                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁

             (pr1 strictify_unit_inv_data F₃))
        • (psfunctor_comp
             (comp_psfunctor strictify
                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂))
             α β ▹ pr1 strictify_unit_inv_data F₃))) X

      exact (strictify_unit_is_pstrans_help₃ F₁ F₂ F₃ α β).
  Qed.

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
is_strict_modification
  (λ X : B₁,
   lunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))
   :
   (pr111 (comp_pstrans strictify_unit
             strictify_unit_inv F)) X ==>
   (pr111 (id_pstrans
             (id_psfunctor
                (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) F)) X)
 abstract
            (intros X Y f ; cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply (modifications_help (strict_psfunctor_to_functor_data F) X Y f)).

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (make_strict_modification
     (λ X : B₁,
      lunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))
      :
      (pr111 (comp_pstrans strictify_unit
                strictify_unit_inv F)) X ==>
      (pr111 (id_pstrans
                (id_psfunctor
                   (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂)) F))
        X)
     (strictify_unit_strictify_unit_inv_subproof F))

HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
∏ X : B₁,
is_invertible_2cell
  ((pr111 (make_strict_modification
             (λ X0 : B₁,
              lunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0))
              :
              (pr111 (comp_pstrans strictify_unit
                        strictify_unit_inv F)) X0 ==>
              (pr111 (id_pstrans
                        (id_psfunctor
                           (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                              B₂)) F)) X0)
             (strictify_unit_strictify_unit_inv_subproof
                F))) X)

is_invertible_2cell (lunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X)))

        is_iso.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
is_modification
  ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    make_invertible_2cell
      (make_is_invertible_strict_modification
         (make_strict_modification
            (λ X : B₁,
             lunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))
             :
             (pr111 (comp_pstrans strictify_unit
                       strictify_unit_inv F)) X ==>
             (pr111 (id_pstrans
                       (id_psfunctor
                          (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁
                             B₂)) F)) X)
            (strictify_unit_strictify_unit_inv_subproof
               F))
         (λ X : B₁,
          is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
            (id₁ ((pr111 F) X))
          :
          is_invertible_2cell
            ((pr111 (make_strict_modification
                       (λ X0 : B₁,
                        lunitor (id₁ ((pr111 F) X0))
                        :
                        (pr111 (comp_pstrans
                                  strictify_unit
                                  strictify_unit_inv F))
                          X0 ==>
                        (pr111 (id_pstrans
                                  (id_psfunctor ...) F))
                          X0)
                       (strictify_unit_strictify_unit_inv_subproof
                          F))) X))))
   :
   invertible_modification_data
     (comp_pstrans strictify_unit strictify_unit_inv)
     (id_pstrans
        (id_psfunctor (strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂))))
 abstract (intros F₁ F₂ α ;
                apply strict_modification_eq ;
                intros X ; cbn ;
                rewrite !vassocr ;
                apply (modification_help_alt
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_functor_data F₁)
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_functor_data F₂)
                         (strict_pstrans_to_nattrans_data α))).
  Defined.

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
∏ X : B₁,
(pr111 (comp_pstrans strictify_unit_inv strictify_unit
          F)) X ==>
(pr111 (id_pstrans
          (comp_psfunctor strictify
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) F))
  X
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
is_strict_modification ?m

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
∏ X : B₁,
(pr111 (comp_pstrans strictify_unit_inv strictify_unit
          F)) X ==>
(pr111 (id_pstrans
          (comp_psfunctor strictify
             (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂)) F))
  X
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X: B₁
id₁ ((pr111 F) X) · id₁ ((pr111 F) X) ==> id₁ (F X)

          exact (lunitor (id₁ _)).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
is_strict_modification
  (λ X : B₁,
   lunitor (id₁ (F X))
   :
   (pr111 (comp_pstrans strictify_unit_inv
             strictify_unit F)) X ==>
   (pr111 (id_pstrans
             (comp_psfunctor strictify
                (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂))
             F)) X)
 abstract
            (intros X Y f ; cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply (modifications_help (strict_psfunctor_to_functor_data F) X Y f)).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (make_strict_modification
     (λ X : B₁,
      lunitor (id₁ (F X))
      :
      (pr111 (comp_pstrans strictify_unit_inv
                strictify_unit F)) X ==>
      (pr111 (id_pstrans
                (comp_psfunctor strictify
                   (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁
                      B₂)) F)) X)
     (strictify_unit_inv_strictify_unit_subproof F))
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
∏ X : B₁,
is_invertible_2cell
  ((pr111 (make_strict_modification
             (λ X0 : B₁,
              lunitor (id₁ (F X0))
              :
              (pr111 (comp_pstrans strictify_unit_inv
                        strictify_unit F)) X0 ==>
              (pr111 (id_pstrans
                        (comp_psfunctor strictify
                           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                              B₁ B₂)) F)) X0)
             (strictify_unit_inv_strictify_unit_subproof
                F))) X)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂
X: B₁
is_invertible_2cell (lunitor (id₁ (F X)))

        is_iso.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₂_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
is_modification
  ((λ F : strict_psfunctor_bicat B₁ B₂,
    make_invertible_2cell
      (make_is_invertible_strict_modification
         (make_strict_modification
            (λ X : B₁,
             lunitor (id₁ (F X))
             :
             (pr111 (comp_pstrans strictify_unit_inv
                       strictify_unit F)) X ==>
             (pr111 (id_pstrans
                       (comp_psfunctor strictify
                          (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor
                             B₁ B₂)) F)) X)
            (strictify_unit_inv_strictify_unit_subproof
               F))
         (λ X : B₁,
          is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ (F X))
          :
          is_invertible_2cell
            ((pr111 (make_strict_modification
                       (λ X0 : B₁,
                        lunitor (id₁ (F X0))
                        :
                        (pr111 (comp_pstrans
                                  strictify_unit_inv
                                  strictify_unit F))
                          X0 ==>
                        (pr111 (id_pstrans
                                  (comp_psfunctor
                                     strictify ...) F))
                          X0)
                       (strictify_unit_inv_strictify_unit_subproof
                          F))) X))))
   :
   invertible_modification_data
     (comp_pstrans strictify_unit_inv strictify_unit)
     (id_pstrans
        (comp_psfunctor strictify
           (strict_psfunctor_to_psfunctor B₁ B₂))))
 abstract (intros F₁ F₂ α ;
                apply strict_modification_eq ;
                intros X ; cbn ;
                rewrite !vassocr ;
                apply (modification_help_alt
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_functor_data F₁)
                         (strict_psfunctor_to_functor_data F₂)
                         (strict_pstrans_to_nattrans_data α))).
  Defined.
End Strictify.
